summary: Backend + frontend regression for the new white-alias + WhatsApp-style swipe-to-reply feature on Campus Chat. 11/11 pytest tests passed (HTTP + WebSocket reply_to round trip + persistence). Frontend: alias labels above non-self bubbles render in WHITE (#FFFFFF) as required; ReplyQuoteBlock correctly renders inside a message bubble (violet left border, original alias in violet + truncated original text above the new message text) — verified by sending a WS message with reply_to and observing it in the group chat. Wall, Friends, Profile screens still load. Swipe gesture itself could NOT be triggered reliably from Playwright (web preview lacks native touch; react-native-web PanResponder thresholds don't fire on synthetic MouseEvents), so the swipe was validated by code review and the rendering of an already-persisted reply message.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Originates from SwipeToReply's icon overlay (pointerEvents="none" prop). Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/SwipeToReply.tsx:65

Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' and '"textShadow*" style props are deprecated.' — appears repeatedly during render. Likely in shared style/theme files (neon glow). Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: Migrate `pointerEvents="none"` prop on the icon overlay in /app/frontend/src/components/SwipeToReply.tsx (line ~65) to `style={{ pointerEvents: 'none', ... }}` to clear the deprecation warning.
Optional: Replace `shadow*` / `textShadow*` style props with `boxShadow` / `textShadow` shorthands in the theme/style files for RN Web compatibility.
No functional fixes required for the white-alias + reply-to feature — both backend storage/broadcast and frontend ReplyQuoteBlock rendering work end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: SwipeToReply correctly debounces with triggered ref + 300ms cooldown to avoid double-firing onReply.
Group chat (/(tabs)/index.tsx) and DM (/chat/[friendId].tsx) both pass reply_to via WS and unconditionally render ReplyQuoteBlock when msg.reply_to is present — symmetry verified.
Backend WS handler snapshots reply_to from data.get('reply_to') for both group_message and private_message and persists it in MongoDB; broadcast payload also includes it.
HTTP fallback /api/messages/send intentionally ignores reply_to (per spec) — no regression.
Alias label is hard-coded to '#FFFFFF' both in group chat (line 305) and DM typing indicator (line 370) — sender_color is no longer used for alias text.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on rendered features (white alias + ReplyQuoteBlock + Wall/Friends/Profile load); swipe gesture itself not exercisable via Playwright web preview

seed_data_creation: Sent 1 HTTP fallback group message (TEST_http_group_msg) and 2 WS group messages (TEST_ws_group_reply with reply_to={sender_alias:'GhostFox42', text:'original text'}) plus 1 WS private message (TEST_ws_dm_reply) using existing seeded user 3e3a0eef-d8c5-479c-9717-3ba1f20f73a7 (NovaOtter15). These are visible in the group room and were used to visually confirm ReplyQuoteBlock rendering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth in this app is OTP-based and the demo OTP is NOT returned by the backend (SMTP delivers it). For E2E without email, inject the seeded user into web storage using: await page.evaluate('(u) => localStorage.setItem("campus_chat_user_v1", JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(u)))', userObj). The storage util JSON-stringifies once and AuthContext JSON-parses again, so double-encoding is required. Seeded user id: 3e3a0eef-d8c5-479c-9717-3ba1f20f73a7. Playwright mouse drag does NOT trigger react-native-web PanResponder reliably; swipe-to-reply gesture requires a touch-enabled browser context (page.context with hasTouch=True) or a native build. To verify reply rendering, post a WS message with reply_to populated and observe the bubble.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bug found. The two new features (white alias label + swipe-to-reply with persisted reply_to) both function as specified.
